info.name: EasyLife Admin Panel API
info.description:
Complete API collection for EasyLife Admin Panel backend.

## Routing Architecture
This API uses **two-tier routing**:
- **Root-level endpoints**: Health checks (`/health/*`), app info (`/info`), and documentation (`/docs`, `/redoc`, `/openapi.json`) are served at the root path (no `/api/v1` prefix).
- **Business API endpoints**: All other endpoints are under `/api/v1` prefix.

## Authentication
Most endpoints require JWT Bearer token. Use the `/auth/login` endpoint first, then the token is auto-set via collection scripts.

### JWT Standard Claims
Tokens now include standard JWT claims:
- `sub` (subject): User identifier
- `iss` (issuer): `easylife-auth`
- `aud` (audience): `easylife-api`

## Apigee Proxy Support
For deployments behind an Apigee API gateway, set the `apigee_base_url` variable to the Apigee proxy base URL. The backend supports `root_path` configuration and CORS origin validation for proxy environments.

## Environment Variables
- `base_url`: API base URL (default: http://localhost:8000)
- `api_prefix`: API version prefix (default: /api/v1)
- `apigee_base_url`: Apigee proxy base URL (optional, for gateway deployments)
- `access_token`: JWT access token (auto-set on login)
- `refresh_token`: JWT refresh token (auto-set on login)
- `admin_email`: Admin email for login
- `admin_password`: Admin password for login

item.name: Health
item.description: Health check, info, and documentation endpoints (no auth required). These are served at the root path, NOT under /api/v1.

request.description: Comprehensive health check including DB connectivity
Simple liveness probe - returns 200 if app is running

item.name: Authentication
item.description: User authentication, registration, and password management

request.description: Login and get JWT tokens. Tokens are auto-saved to collection variables.
Refresh expired access token using refresh token
Reset password using token from email
List users with pagination and filters
Get user by ID or email
Admin: send password reset email to user
Get customers assigned to current user
